merge_count: {move_rule_text} Using the shown move arrow, how many merges occur?
{move_rule_text} Apply the shown move once. Count the number of tile merges.
{move_rule_text} If the board is moved in the arrow direction, how many merge events happen?
{move_rule_text} For the displayed move, report the count of equal-tile merges.
{move_rule_text} How many pairs of equal tiles merge after the shown move?
max_tile_value: {move_rule_text} After applying the shown move once, what is the largest tile value on the board?
{move_rule_text} Move the board in the arrow direction. What is the maximum resulting tile value?
{move_rule_text} What is the largest tile after the displayed move is made?
{move_rule_text} Apply the shown move and report the highest tile value that remains.
{move_rule_text} Which tile value is the maximum after the one-arrow move?
move_result_board_label: {move_rule_text} {result_board_rule_text} Which labeled candidate board shows the result after the shown move?
{move_rule_text} {result_board_rule_text} Apply the arrow move once. Which option board matches the resulting board state?
{move_rule_text} {result_board_rule_text} Choose the label of the candidate board that matches the board after this one move.
{move_rule_text} {result_board_rule_text} After the displayed move, which labeled board is correct?
{move_rule_text} {result_board_rule_text} Report the option letter for the post-move board.

scene:visible_2048_board.object_description: a 4 x 4 2048 board with numbered tiles and move arrows

query:merge_count.move_rule_text: In 2048, a move slides all tiles toward the arrow; equal adjacent tiles in that direction merge once.
query:merge_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of merges made by the shown move
query:merge_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a list of merge segments. Each segment uses two pixel-point endpoints [x, y] in [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]] form, connecting the centers of the two source tile cells before the move that combine into one tile after the move; use [] when the merge count is 0

query:max_tile_value.move_rule_text: In 2048, a move slides all tiles toward the arrow; equal adjacent tiles in that direction merge once.
query:max_tile_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the largest tile value after the shown move
query:max_tile_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] around the original tile cell or cells that form the largest tile after the shown move

query:move_result_board_label.move_rule_text: In 2048, a move slides all tiles toward the arrow; equal adjacent tiles in that direction merge once.
query:move_result_board_label.result_board_rule_text: Labeled candidate boards are shown below. Use only the slide-and-merge result before any new tile is added.
query:move_result_board_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the single option letter of the candidate board that matches the result after the shown move
query:move_result_board_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1] around the selected candidate result board
